mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quests (user_id, title, period, stat_type, xp_size, verify_type, notify_type, notify_tab, show_card, is_template, is_active, target_minutes, deadline) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{period}, #{statType}, #{xpSize}, #{verifyType}, #{notifyType}, #{notifyTab}, #{showCard}, #{template}, 1, #{targetMinutes}, CURDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT q.quest_id, q.user_id, q.title, q.period, q.stat_type, q.xp_size, q.verify_type, q.notify_type, q.notify_tab, q.show_card, q.is_template AS template, q.is_active AS active, q.target_minutes, q.created_at, q.deadline, q.extended_at, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM quest_logs ql WHERE ql.quest_id = q.quest_id AND DATE(ql.completed_at) = CURDATE() ) THEN true ELSE false END AS completed FROM quests q WHERE q.user_id = #{userId} AND q.period = #{period} AND q.is_active = 1 ORDER BY q.created_at DESC

SELECT quest_id, user_id, title, period, stat_type, xp_size, verify_type, notify_type, notify_tab, show_card, is_template AS template, is_active AS active, target_minutes, created_at, deadline, extended_at FROM quests WHERE quest_id = #{questId}
mapper.update: UPDATE quests SET deadline = DATE_ADD(deadline, INTERVAL 1 DAY), extended_at = NOW() WHERE quest_id = #{questId}
UPDATE quests SET is_active = 0 WHERE deadline < CURDATE() AND is_active = 1 AND period = 'DAILY'
mapper.select: SELECT quest_id, user_id, title, period, stat_type, xp_size, verify_type, notify_type, notify_tab, show_card, is_template AS template, is_active AS active, target_minutes, created_at FROM quests WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_template = 1 AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
